title: ayapanopsis thermarum
intro: Ayapanopsis thermarum, also known as the "Lost Plant", is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, the plant has been found to possess medicinal properties that can help in reducing inflammation and fever. The health benefits of Ayapanopsis thermarum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an anti-inflammatory agent to alleviate pain and swelling. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or added to bathwater for topical application.
